_comment_version: Master config file for tkads system — single source of truth for store configurations.
_comment_generated: Generated from hardcoded values in tkads.js, collect_day_by_day.py, api.py, daily-report.py

defaults._comment: Default values applied to all stores unless overridden

gates._comment: Gate rules that control feature availability — all enabled by default

constitution._comment: IMMUTABLE rules of the system — these must NEVER be violated
rules: NEVER modify ROI or budget of legacy plans with existing data
All automation ads MUST be named '自动化-<SPU_ID>'
Each automation plan MUST contain exactly 1 product
Do NOT change timezone or start time (use defaults)
New ads must check SPU availability first

hanmac._comment: Hanmac.my — primary store on TikTok Seller Malaysia
